title: Build the Web client rendering and UI shell
summary: Create a browser shell with PixiJS canvas, React DOM overlay, input plumbing, resize handling and a static read-model smoke screen.
acceptance: Pixi renders a chunked test map without per-cell React components
React renders a selected-entity inspector from a read model
Canvas/UI resize and input work in supported Chromium
Playwright smoke test captures a deterministic screenshot

history.details: Built Web shell with Pixi chunk map, React HUD/inspector, resize/input plumbing, deterministic Chromium screenshot smoke; owner gates passed.
changes_requested: High: none; Medium: missing dependency policy/ADR evidence for new React/Pixi/Playwright stack and root skipLibCheck relaxation
Addressed reviewer dependency-policy evidence and scoped TypeScript lib-check exception; pnpm typecheck, pnpm test, and pnpm test:e2e pass.

review.summary: High: none; Medium: missing dependency policy/ADR evidence for new React/Pixi/Playwright stack and root skipLibCheck relaxation
